collectible.name: Italian M33 Helmet
collectible.description:
Italian M33 steel helmet, the standard helmet of the Royal Italian Army during World War II. This pre-war example dates to 1938 and shows the quality of peacetime production.
The M33 is easily recognized by its distinctive rounded shape and prominent front visor ridge. This example retains its original grey-green paint finish typical of Italian helmets of this era.
Interior features the original leather liner with aluminum frame and leather chinstrap. Manufacturer stamps visible inside indicate production at the Societ� Metallurgica Italiana facility.
